script:
set +e
echo === heather ALLOWED list ===
sudo grep -nE '^ALLOWED|^ALLOWED_USER|HEATHER_AAD' /home/heather/heather-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -8
echo
echo === alejandro gate ===
sudo grep -nE 'aadObjectId|ALEJANDRO_AAD|YOO_AAD|OWNER_AAD|GUEST' /home/alejandro/alejandro-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo
echo === all migrated bots gate checks ===
for s in aixa ashley cameron emily-claude gabriel jesus-reyes neil neil-claude rosi stephanie-claude zahid; do
  LU=$(systemctl show ${s}-bot.service -p User --value 2>/dev/null)
  echo "--- $s (lu=$LU)"
  sudo grep -nE 'aadObjectId' /home/$LU/${s}-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -3
done
echo
echo === skype TAPP global policy ===
ST=$(curl -s -H 'Metadata:true' 'http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=48ac35b8-9aa8-4d74-927d-1f4a14a0b239' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ST" 'https://api.interfaces.records.teams.microsoft.com/Skype.Policy/policies/TeamsAppPermissionPolicy?tag=Global' | python3 -c 'import json,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print("OrgAppsType:",p.get("OrgCatalogAppsType","?")); print("OrgAppsList:",len(p.get("OrgCatalogAppsList",[])),"entries")' 2>&1 | head -10
